message:
Streamline CI builds with orthogonal feature flags

Replace the monolithic CI_BUILD flag with two orthogonal flags:
- CHECK_LINKS: enables link validation during build
- LLMS_TXT: enables llms-txt generation

This change eliminates redundant builds for PRs by:
- Removing the separate linkcheck job from lint.yaml
- Running link validation in the main build workflow
- Skipping expensive changelog sync for PR builds
- Only generating llms-txt artifacts for main branch deploys

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -43,6 +43,7 @@ jobs:
         uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v4
 
       - name: Sync external content
+        if: github.event_name != 'pull_request'
         run: |
           pnpm sync:changelog
 
@@ -53,10 +54,10 @@ jobs:
       - name: Build with Astro
         run: |
           if [[ "${{ github.event_name }}" == "pull_request" ]]; then
-            pnpm astro build \
+            CHECK_LINKS=true pnpm astro build \
               --site "https://tenzir-docs-preview-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}.surge.sh"
           else
-            CI_BUILD=true pnpm astro build \
+            CHECK_LINKS=true LLMS_TXT=true pnpm astro build \
               --site "${{ steps.pages.outputs.origin }}" \
               --base "${{ steps.pages.outputs.base_path }}"
           fi

@@ -73,33 +73,3 @@ jobs:
       - name: Run Prettier
         run: pnpm lint:prettier
 
-  linkcheck:
-    name: Link Check
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
-    steps:
-      - name: Checkout repository
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
-        with:
-          fetch-depth: 0
-          submodules: recursive
-
-      - name: Install pnpm
-        run: npm install -g pnpm
-
-      - name: Setup Node.js and pnpm
-        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
-        with:
-          node-version: "20"
-          cache: "pnpm"
-
-      - name: Install dependencies
-        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
-
-      # TODO: remove after having validated it's really not needed by build:ci
-      #- name: Sync external content
-      #  run: |
-      #    pnpm sync:changelog
-
-      - name: Run link check
-        run: pnpm run build:ci

@@ -17,7 +17,8 @@
     "lint:eslint:fix": "eslint . --ext .js,.jsx,.ts,.tsx,.astro --fix",
     "lint:prettier": "prettier --check .",
     "lint:prettier:fix": "prettier --write .",
-    "build:ci": "CI_BUILD=true pnpm build",
+    "build:linkcheck": "CHECK_LINKS=true pnpm build",
+    "build:full": "CHECK_LINKS=true LLMS_TXT=true pnpm build",
     "lint:fix": "pnpm run lint:markdown:fix && pnpm run lint:eslint:fix && pnpm run lint:prettier:fix",
     "postinstall": "node scripts/fix-starlight-llms-txt.js"
   },
